<!--

Some key notes before you open a PR:

 1. Select which branch should this PR be merged in? By default, you should always merge to the develop branch.
 2. All tests pass locally, and in the runner
 3. Update necessary Documentation
 4. Put `closes #XXXX` in your comment to auto-close the issue that your PR fixes


Also, if you're new here

- Contribution Guide => https://github.com/FPGAwars/icestudo/blob/develop/CONTRIBUTING.md

-->

> Please provide enough information so that others can review your pull request:

<!-- You can skip this if you're fixing a typo or updating existing documentation -->

> Explain the **details** for making this change. What existing problem does the pull request solve?

<!-- Example: When "Adding a function to do X", explain why it is necessary to have a way to do X. -->

> Screenshots/GIFs

<!-- Add images/recordings to better visualize the change: expected/current behviour -->
